html:
Exclusive to:

An Ocuvigil is a Don't Starve Together exclusive Structure, introduced in A New Reign. It is found in the Tools Filter and Magic Filter, requires a Purple Moonlens, a Compass and 2 Boards to craft, and a Prestihatitator to prototype. It serves as a Map marker and is also used for revealing the Fog of War in a certain location to all players. Contrary to popular belief, it does not keep the area around it loaded.

Tips

  • Placing Ocuvigil next to Bee Queen's hive will keep the players informed whenever she respawns. There are multiple similar uses of this structure, such as keeping an eye on Spider Dens and knowing when the Ruins regenerate.
  • Normally, Wortox cannot teleport onto a Boat from the map. However, if an Ocuvigil is placed on the boat, Wortox can teleport to it. It is recommended to place the Ocuvigil in the middle of the boat to prevent drowning by accident.

Trivia

  • The Ocuvigil was added in the East or West, Base is Best update.
  • It's referred to as a "sentryward" in the game files. Also, a similar structure with the same name and function exists in multiple MOBAs.
  • The name "Ocuvigil" is a portmanteau of "oculus" and "vigil".
  • It used to be crafted with a Yellow Moonlens, that was replaced by a Purple Moonlens in a later update, as Yellow Gems are not easily available in worlds without Caves.
  • Placing Ocuvigil on a boat that's been moved with an oar used to result in a slow and random, but automatic exploration of the ocean. Creating such set would've cost 6 planks, compass and a purple moonrock. As of the Waterlogged Update, this can no longer happen, since boats now no longer retain their momentum after rowing only once.

Gallery

  • The Ocuvigil glowing.
  • The Ocuvigil when burnt.
  • The Ocuvigil as seen on the Map.
  • The old Ocuvigil crafting icon.
  • The old Ocuvigil.
  • The old Ocuvigil as seen on the Map.
  • Ocuvigil as seen in the poster for the East or West, Base is Best update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"sentryward"
“That's an entirely scientific mapping tool.”
–Wilson
“Pfft. It'll burn like the rest.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang thinks is full of secrets.”
–Wolfgang
“Grant us the power of sight...”
–Wendy
“LOOKS DUMB”
–WX-78
“Ah! A scrying orb.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's an odd looking tree.”
–Woodie
“This is a conduit for strong revelatory magicks.”
–Maxwell
“May the secrets öf this land be divulged by the göds.”
–Wigfrid
“Woah! I bet it sees so far!”
–Webber
“It's watching over us.”
–Warly
“Sparkly Stone see far!”
–Wormwood
“Someone's got their eye on me.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu! What a mischievous way to spy!”
–Wortox
“How it float like that?”
–Wurt
“Map making is so much more interesting here!”
–Walter
“Good, this will help me get the lay of the land quicker.”
–Wanda
An Ocuvigil is a Don't Starve Together exclusive Structure, introduced in A New Reign. It is found in the Tools Filter and Magic Filter, requires a Purple Moonlens, a Compass and 2 Boards to craft, and a Prestihatitator to prototype. It serves as a Map marker and is also used for revealing the Fog of War in a certain location to all players. Contrary to popular belief, it does not keep the area around it loaded.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Placing Ocuvigil next to Bee Queen's hive will keep the players informed whenever she respawns. There are multiple similar uses of this structure, such as keeping an eye on Spider Dens and knowing when the Ruins regenerate.
Normally, Wortox cannot teleport onto a Boat from the map. However, if an Ocuvigil is placed on the boat, Wortox can teleport to it. It is recommended to place the Ocuvigil in the middle of the boat to prevent drowning by accident.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Ocuvigil was added in the East or West, Base is Best update.
It's referred to as a "sentryward" in the game files. Also, a similar structure with the same name and function exists in multiple MOBAs.
The name "Ocuvigil" is a portmanteau of "oculus" and "vigil".
It used to be crafted with a Yellow Moonlens, that was replaced by a Purple Moonlens in a later update, as Yellow Gems are not easily available in worlds without Caves.
Placing Ocuvigil on a boat that's been moved with an oar used to result in a slow and random, but automatic exploration of the ocean. Creating such set would've cost 6 planks, compass and a purple moonrock. As of the Waterlogged Update, this can no longer happen, since boats now no longer retain their momentum after rowing only once.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ocuvigil là một Cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong A New Reign. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Công Cụ và Bộ Lọc Ma Thuật, yêu cầu Thấu Kính Mặt Trăng Tím, La Bàn và 2 Bàn Cờ để chế tạo, và Máy Mũ Cao Cấp để nguyên mẫu. Nó đóng vai trò như một điểm đánh dấu trên Bản đồ và cũng được sử dụng để hiển thị Sương mù chiến tranh ở một vị trí nhất định cho tất cả người chơi. Ngược lại với suy nghĩ thông thường, nó không giữ cho khu vực xung quanh nó chịu tải.
title: Ocuvigil

It is found in the [[Tools Filter]] and [[Magic Filter]], requires a [[Moonlens|Purple Moonlens]], a [[Compass]] and 2 [[Boards]] to craft, and a [[Prestihatitator]] to prototype. It serves as a [[Map]] marker and is also used for revealing the [[Wikipedia:Fog of war#In video games|Fog of War]] in a certain location to all players. Contrary to popular belief, it does not keep the area around it loaded. == {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips== *Placing Ocuvigil next to [[Bee Queen|Bee Queen's]] hive will keep the players informed whenever she respawns. There are multiple similar uses of this structure, such as keeping an eye on [[Spider Den]]s and knowing when the [[Ruins]] regenerate. *Normally, [[Wortox]] cannot teleport onto a [[Boat]] from the map. However, if an Ocuvigil is placed on the boat, Wortox can teleport to it. It is recommended to place the Ocuvigil in the middle of the boat to prevent drowning by accident. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== *The Ocuvigil was added in the ''[[A New Reign#August 11, 2016 - East or West, Base is Best|East or West, Base is Best]]'' update. *It's referred to as a "sentryward" in the game files. Also, a similar structure with the same name and function exists in multiple MOBAs. *The name "Ocuvigil" is a portmanteau of "oculus" and "vigil". *It used to be crafted with a [[Moonlens|Yellow Moonlens]], that was replaced by a Purple Moonlens in a later update, as [[Yellow Gem]]s are not easily available in worlds without [[Caves]]. *Placing Ocuvigil on a [[Boats|boat]] that's been moved with an [[oar]] used to result in a slow and random, but automatic exploration of the ocean. Creating such set would've cost 6 planks, compass and a purple moonrock. As of the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#Waterlogged Beta .28since July 26.2C 2021.29|Waterlogged Update]], this can no longer happen, since boats now no longer retain their momentum after rowing only once. =={{pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Ocuvigil screenshot.png|The Ocuvigil glowing.
